{{CargoRelic
|name=The Royal Hunt Platter
|class_id=22834
|rank=SS
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=A Sasanian king gallops across this hammered silver plate, his golden lions frozen mid-roar. Fifteen centuries pass, yet the monarch's youth remains undimmed in gleaming metal.
|fame=60
|art=74
|fth=101
|civ=46
|tech=66
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +6<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +6<br>Realms Conquered: 9/9
|ss2=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +12<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +12<br>Realms Conquered: 9/9
|ss3=Snail ATK +40<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +18<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +18<br>Realms Conquered: 9/9
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +30<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +30<br>Realms Conquered: 9/9
|ss5=Snail ATK +80<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +42<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +42<br>Realms Conquered: 9/9
|ss6=Snail ATK +110<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +60<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +60<br>Realms Conquered: 9/9
|ss7=Snail ATK +110<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +60<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +60<br>Realms Conquered: 9/9<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:skill@1123_1_1.png|50px]]prop@4084_2
|skill2=[[File:skill@1125_1_1.png|50px]]prop@4052_2
|skill3=[[File:skill@1124_1_1.png|50px]]prop@4054_2
}}
